View All Rates

Waiver Required

Safety is our top priority.

Every jumper needs a valid waiver on file before participating. Adults 18+ must sign for themselves. Minors under 18 must be signed by a parent or legal guardian.

Frequently Asked Questions

What should I wear?

Wear comfortable athletic clothing. Jump socks are required for all participants.

Do I need to book in advance?

We highly recommend booking online to guarantee your jump time, especially on weekends.

Are there age restrictions?

We have areas for all ages! Toddlers 5 and under have their own dedicated jump time and area.

Can I bring outside food?

Outside food is only permitted for reserved birthday parties with a cake or cupcakes.
